name: GWP Dev Screenshot
description: Dev-only in-session screenshot driver for debugging GNOME Widget Panel UI bugs. Exports org.gwp.DevShot (Screenshot / ScreenshotArea / PanelBounds) on the session bus, capturing via the in-process Shell.Screenshot (which external callers cannot use). NOT part of the product and never shipped in a release; an agent installs it for a debug session and removes it after. See tools/dev-screenshot/README.md.
